name: @sittir/python
description: Typed Python IR builder — node kinds from tree-sitter-python grammar

scripts.generate: rm -f src/factories.ts src/from.ts src/ir.ts src/utils.ts src/types.ts src/consts.ts src/index.ts templates.yaml tests/nodes.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types ../codegen/src/cli.ts --grammar python --all --output src/
scripts.regenerate: pnpm generate && pnpm build && pnpm test

//peer: spec 012 T038: @sittir/python-native is a workspace optionalDependency.
